title: Kanmani Anbudan
description: Vennila gives Kanmani and Anbu a grand welcome for their courageous victory while threatening to trouble them further. Later, Anbu searches for Kanmani to confess his feelings.

title: Thendrale Mella Pesu
description: Paraman suppresses his emotions as he reluctantly sends Ilamathi out of the house. Determined to stay with Paraman, Ilamathi seeks legal support from the police and an advocate.

title: Suttum Vizhi Sudare
description: Vetri rushes Diya to the hospital, where a heartbroken Sarala learns she needs life-saving surgery. Later, Abinaya and Shanmugam firmly reject Vetri's help.

title: Thaai Maaman
description: Despite Azhagar's refusal, Mayandi insists on conducting Azhagar and Poongodi's wedding again as a horoscope remedy. Determined to reunite them, he seeks Azhagar's friend's help.

title: Sindhu Bairavi
description: Despite Sanjay accusing Arumugam of destroying Bairavi's sugarcane farm, Mara presents video proof of his involvement. Later, Bairavi lashes out and demands an immediate divorce.

title: Azhagae Azhagu
description: Mathi and Suresh's dispute intensifies when Suresh slaps her in anger, and she retaliates by slapping him back. Later, Ragavan confronts Mathi's parents to settle the issue.

title: Pandian Stores 2
description: Gomathi rebukes Sakthivel for criticising Kathir and doubting his genuine care for Muthuvel. Arasi turns down Karthikeyan's request to join him for coffee and a conversation.

title: Ayyanar Thunai
description: Nila refuses Manohar's offer to buy a TV, standing firmly by Chozhan's family. Later, Pallavan reveals Chandayatha's father's intense opposition to Cheran's marriage.

title: Siragadikka Aasai
description: Just as Rohini is about to sign the divorce papers, she suddenly collapses. The doctor's confirmation that she is pregnant leaves Manoj stunned.

title: Kadhal Kadhal Kadhal
description: Swetha surprises everyone by selecting Arjun as her life partner. Later, Karikalan announces her choice and sends the brothers to get a shell-shocked Arjun ready.

title: Onna Irukka Kaththukanum
description: Murugan observes Indhira receiving thoughtful gifts from her family. Inspired by a customer's granddaughter, Sarasu dreams of sending her children to an English-medium school.
